title: Wolfspeed shares extend rally after Citrini spotlights AI infrastructure potential (WOLF)
text: Wolfspeed stock climbed 20% on Wednesday morning, extending a seven-session winning streak following a research report from Citrini highlighting the chipmaker's prospects in artificial intelligence infrastructure. Citrini designated Wolfspeed as its single-stock highlight within the AI infrastructure sector, emphasizing the company's advantageous position after bankruptcy restructuring. The firm argued that Wolfspeed's aggressive capacity expansion—which ultimately led to bankruptcy—has created an unusual investment opportunity. The semiconductor manufacturer underwent a creditor-supported restructuring last year that eliminated approximately $4.6 billion in debt, positioning the company to capitalize on growing long-term AI infrastructure demand. Over six trading sessions, Wolfspeed shares gained roughly 50%, reflecting broader momentum in semiconductor and AI-related infrastructure stocks. The chip sector has experienced renewed investor interest driven by sustained demand for AI infrastructure components and tightening global memory chip supply conditions. Related semiconductor manufacturers, optical component companies, and data storage firms also advanced Wednesday.
